titleStmt.title: SII 24.417: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 417.

summary.p: Gives the details of golden utensils, a gold-plate covering (dress) and gold plated (trappings?) for the doors of the retiring chamber of god Raṅganātha presented by the king during the regime of Avasaram Mallarasa. The total value of the articles is given as 20260 gadyāṇa. The details of the date viz., Śaka 1457 (current), Jaya, Mārgaśira ba. 12, Wednesday regularly correspond to 1534 A.D. December 2, Wednesday, ·73.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ṁ śubhamastu . svastiśrīman mahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara mūvaru rāyara gaṁḍa Arirāyara gaṁḍa Arirāyaravibhāḍa Aṣṭadikkurāyamanōbhayaṁkara bhāṣage tappuva rāyaragaṁḍa pū¨rva dakṣiṇa paścima samudrādhīśvara . pāṁḍyarājya sthāpanācā¨ryya śrī vīrapratāpa śrīvira Acyuta dēvarāya mahārāyarū vijayanagaradallū prathvīrājyaṁ gaiUtti¨rddu . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śāli vāhana śakavaruṣaṁgaḷu 1457 neya jayasaṁvatsarada mā¨rgaśira ba 12 budhavāra pu ṇyakāladallū śrīraṁgada śrīraṁganātha dēvarigē sama¨rpisi kaḷuha cittaista cinnada svarūpagaḷa vivara . taṁma Ubhayavāgi naivēdyakke sama¨rpisida ciṁnada hiri yaharivāṇa 1 kkaṁ beṁṇa ¦¦ llū cakrahaga 4432 . taṁma paṭṭadadēviyaru varadājyaṁmanavara Ubhayavāgi naivē
© dyakke sama¨rpisida cikkaharivāṇa 1 kkaṁ beṁṇa ¦¦ llū . cakratūṁka ga 5010 ṁ taṁma kumāra cikkaveṁkaṭādrirāyara Ubhayavāgi jelipāla naivēdyakke sama¨rpisida ciṁnada hiriyabhaṭṭalu 1 kkaṁ beṁṇa ¦¦ llū cakratūka ga 931 . 2 saUṭu 1 kkaṁ baṁṇa ¦¦ cakratūka ga 74 . 1 Ā vijayanagaradallū sama¨rpisi kaḷeuha cittaista jeṁnnedasvarūpa 4 kkaṁ baṁna ¦¦ llū cakratūka ga 9453 . 3 mattaṁ śrīraṁgadallū Avasaradamallarasana pārupatyadalli taṁma Ubhayavāgi māḍisa cittaisi sama¨rpisida ciṁnada pītāṁbarada svarūpa 1 kkaṁ tagaḍu 14 kkaṁ baṁṇa bage kkaṁ cakratūka ga 9931 ki 3 . ciṁnada kāḷāṁji 1 kkaṁ baṁṇa ¦¦ llū cakratūka
ṁ ga 31 ¦¦ 3 Ubhayaṁ svarūpa baga 2 kkaṁ baṁṇa bage 4 kkaṁ cakratūkka ga 10140 sajjāgṛhada bāgila bāgilu vāḍakke tāṁbradamēle tūḍada ciṁnabaṁṇa ga ¦¦ llū cakratūka ga 997 Ubhayaṁ śrīraṁgadallū sama¨rpisiddu [nirupa tōḍahasaha 3 ciṁna baṁṇa bage 5 kkaṁ cakratūka ga 10807 Ā vijayanaga bage 7 kkaṁ sama¨rpisiddu ciṁna svarūpa bage 7 kkaṁ nānābaṁṇadallu cakratūka ga 30360 . 3 yī UbhayaŪ Acaṁdrā¨rkkavāgi śrīraṁganātha dēvarige naḍaya luṁṭāddū . Eṁdu māḍida sēvege dha¨rmmaśilāśāsana . śrīkaṣṇā¨rpaṇamastu .
Digital edition of SII 24.417 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
